mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT m.id, m.parent_id as parentId, m.menu_name as menuName, m.route_name as routeName, m.route_path as routePath, m.component, m.menu_type as menuType, m.icon, m.sort_num as sortNum, m.is_hide as isHide, m.keep_alive as keepAlive FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY m.sort_num ASC
